title: crotalaria avonensis
intro: Crotalaria avonensis is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. It is a medicinal plant known for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria avonensis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating symptoms of rheumatism. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria avonensis are often made into teas, decoctions, or infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, but it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it due to potential toxicity.
